task: Add missing unit + e2e test coverage for the already-shipped login screen (GoogleLoginButton + /login route), per AGENTS.md's per-feature testing mandate.
acceptanceCriteria: unit tests cover button render, OAuth click wiring, error display, and error-clear-on-retry
e2e tests cover unauthenticated redirect to /login, login page render, and OAuth click wiring without completing real Google OAuth
no regressions in existing unit or e2e suites
no new npm dependencies added without approval
